text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 174 

U = Documentation is insufficient to determine if the condition was present at the time of inpatient 
admission. CMS will not pay the CC/MCC DRG for those selected HACs that are coded as 'U' for the POA 
Indicator. 

W = Clinically undetermined. Provider is unable to clinically determine whether condition was present at 
the time of inpatient admission. CMS will pay the CC/MCC DRG for those
